title: Procurement Specialist|OBJECTIVE: Draft a Request for Quotation (RFQ) to send...
prompt: ROLE: Procurement Specialist|OBJECTIVE: Draft a Request for Quotation (RFQ) to send to potential suppliers for the component **{component_part_number}**.|REQUIREMENTS: Specify the required annual volume of {annual_volume} units.|Include detailed technical specifications from the document {spec_sheet_path}.|Request pricing tiers for different order quantities.|STYLE: Formal, detailed, and enables clear comparison between suppliers.|OUTPUT FORMAT: A Word document-ready RFQ in Markdown.
